message:
refactor: AST type renames, idiomatic let-chain refactors, and API migration

- parser.rs: collapse nested if + if-let into Rust 2024 if-let chains in
  parse_object_binding_pattern and parse_array_binding_pattern rest-element
  validation; update 3 test assertions for upstream AST type renames
  (VariableKind -> VariableDeclarationKind, string literals -> typed
  Expression::Identifier variants)
- parser_arena.rs: update test assertion from string "+" to typed
  BinaryOperator::Add enum variant to match AST type changes
- attested_execution_cell.rs: migrate from removed reg.event_count() method
  to reg.events().len() to track upstream API change
- parser_grammar_closure_backlog.json: mark variable_declaration,
  function_declaration, and arrow_function grammar families as "supported"
  now that destructuring/BindingPattern support has landed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
